customer_gate.customer: Not yet named. Three target archetypes defined in POD_BRIEFS.md; zero named individuals engaged.
customer_gate.pain: Hypothesised: SME operators (1-10 person firms) in AU need pre-priced, compliance-aware, vertical-specific operations packs that don't require enterprise procurement. Not validated.
customer_gate.first_value: Hypothesised: $49-$1999 entry-tier pack subscription producing a measurable compliance or operations outcome within 30 days of activation. Not measured.
customer_gate.payer: Unknown. Either (a) end SME customer pays partner who pays T4H; or (b) end SME pays T4H direct.
customer_gate.economic_path: Three models stress-tested in POD_BRIEFS.md (Model A: subscription / Model B: diagnostic + subscription / Model C: subscription + value-share). Margin floors not yet validated against vertical-specific cost basis.
